name: Arbitrum Sepolia

faucets.name: Alchemy Arbitrum Sepolia Faucet
faucets.note: Direct Arbitrum Sepolia drip. Requires a small mainnet ETH balance to qualify.

faucets.name: QuickNode Arbitrum Sepolia Faucet
faucets.note: Direct Arbitrum Sepolia drip. Requires a small mainnet ETH balance to qualify.

faucets.name: Chainlink Arbitrum Sepolia Faucet
faucets.note: Direct Arbitrum Sepolia drip. Requires a mainnet LINK balance to qualify.

faucets.name: Google Cloud Web3 Faucet (ETH Sepolia → bridge)
faucets.note: No mainnet balance required, but hands out Ethereum Sepolia ETH. Bridge to Arbitrum Sepolia afterwards using the bridge link below.

faucetWarnings: The Google Cloud Web3 Faucet (cloud.google.com/application/web3/faucet) hands out Ethereum Sepolia ETH, not Arbitrum Sepolia ETH. Tokens from it will not appear on Arbitrum Sepolia — use one of the curated faucets below instead, or bridge from ETH Sepolia.
